EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User with ID {subject.id} deleted the record (ID {object.value}) from the table {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User with ID {subject.id} modified the record (ID {object.value}) in the table {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User with ID {subject.id} added the record (ID {object.value}) into the table {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
